office_does: A state representative writes and votes on state laws and budgets, conducts oversight, and represents their legislative district.
race_blurb: Incumbent Davina Duerr faces Maggie Wang.

candidates.summary: Duerr is an incumbent representative, architect, and former Bothell councilmember and deputy mayor.
highlights: Emphasizes housing supply, climate and clean energy, transportation, and local-government coordination [S2].

housing.basis: Duerr explicitly emphasizes housing supply as an affordability strategy.

climate.basis: She explicitly emphasizes climate and clean energy.

experience.basis: She is an incumbent legislator and former councilmember and deputy mayor.

candidates.summary: Wang is a candidate whose identity and office are verified, but the dossier contains no sufficiently detailed policy platform.
highlights: Official election records verify her candidacy [S1][S2].
